positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical illustration of a majestic, celestial fox seated in a vibrant meadow. The fox is rendered in clean, thick black line art combined with striking gradient watercolor fills of deep sapphire blue, cosmic purple, and glowing gold. The background incorporates geometric patterns, crystalline flora, and minimalist constellations, giving it a sacred, mystical ambiance. The composition is perfectly centralized, ensuring a strong, repeatable motif ideal for apparel. Style: Modern Boho Mysticism, high contrast vector illustration with watercolor texture overlay. Lighting: Studio flash, flat lighting emphasizing silhouette and color separation. Print-friendly, graphic novel quality.
negative: blur, sketch, low resolution, noise, grain, watermark, text, signature, logo, copyright, artifact, messy, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poor composition, photorealistic, graffiti, messy watercolor
